headline: Undefeated Tennessee travels to Columbus seeking statement win
subhead: Ohio State's defensive struggles will be tested by Tennessee's balanced attack.

xFactor.why: Ohio State surrendered 29 points to Texas and must tighten gap integrity against a Tennessee team that methodically beat Penn State with precision rather than flash.

keyMatchup: Tennessee's ability to sustain drives and control clock against Ohio State's pass rush will determine whether the Volunteers can protect their undefeated record on the road.
body: Tennessee arrives in Columbus as college football's last unbeaten team after a gritty 26-20 win over Penn State that revealed more about their resilience than their ceiling. The Volunteers won that game through discipline and execution, not explosive plays, and that formula will be tested by an Ohio State defense that looked porous in a 29-15 loss to Texas two weeks ago. The Buckeyes' inability to contain lateral movement and underneath passing created a template other teams will study.

Ohio State cannot afford to fall to 1-2 at home, and the Buckeyes' offense should generate scoring opportunities against a Tennessee secondary that has faced limited aerial volume through two games. But the defensive mismatch favors the visitor: Tennessee's patient play-calling and multiple running options will stress an Ohio State front that has yet to establish consistent pressure. If the Volunteers can establish their ground game early and keep the Buckeyes' offense off the field, they walk out with a resume-defining road win.
